name: Kirk Franklin
description: '''Kirk Dewayne Franklin''' (born January 26, 1970) is an American gospel songwriter, composer, rapper, singer, and record producer. Franklin's accolades include 20 [[Grammy Awards]]. ''[[Variety (magazine)|Variety]]'' has called Franklin a "Reigning King of Urban Gospel", and Franklin is one of the inaugural inductees into the [[Black Music & Entertainment Walk of Fame]]. Franklin in the beginning of his career, included The Family, [[God's Property]], and [[One Nation Crew]] (1NC) on his record releases.
